column1: # Reference aircraft for the Weight Estimate MTOW-vs-OEW comparison plot.
# Nominal published specifications for visual reference only -- NOT certification
# data and NOT used in any FAR computation. Weights in lb
# engine_type uses the WTESTIMA vocabulary (recip / turboprop) where it applies.
# The lower block is a heavier / concept tier (twins
# transports) added for Phase-C concept designs that exceed the GA band; jets carry
# max_hp = 0 (no shaft power) and are excluded from the W/P comparison.
